fields.label: Callback Signing Secret
fields.description: Shared secret used to HMAC-sign outbound callbacks (X-iPay-Signature). Set the same value in n8n. Leave blank to send unsigned.

fields.label: Automatically Create iPay Request for COD Customers Enabled
Collect Payment Terms
fields.description: Only invoices on these payment terms appear in the Collect app (e.g. Cash on Delivery, End of Day) — the terms drivers settle on delivery. Leave empty to include every outstanding invoice.

fields.label: M-Pesa Max Amount
fields.description: Above this amount the M-Pesa STK prompt is hidden (M-Pesa can't process it) and only hosted checkout (card / Airtel) is offered. 0 = no cap.

fields.label: Payment Link Validity (days)
fields.description: Days a payment link stays valid before it must be regenerated. Default 7.
Fallback receiving account, used only when the invoice's company has no Default Cash Account set.
fields.label: Cash Account (fallback)

fields.description: Fallback account for collected cheques, used only when the Cheque Mode of Payment has no account set for the company. Cheques must never book to cash.
fields.label: Cheque Account (fallback)

fields.description: Where money-at-risk alerts (a payment confirmed at iPay but not recorded) are emailed. Leave blank to log to Error Log only.
fields.label: Alert Email

fields.description: When the reconcile backstop last ran. A stale value (see reconcile_heartbeat) means it has stopped and payments may be unrecovered.
fields.label: Last Reconcile Run

fields.description: Tick to give a Sales Manager only the customers their own Sales Person is named on, exactly like a Sales User. Left off, they see every member's book on the sales page and can filter to one.
fields.label: Restrict Sales Managers to Their Own Book
